patch.value: Sentry PM-CLI-29: external Neo4j command reports missing configuration as a high pm-cli error

Investigate and correctly classify or re-home the live Sentry high CommandError emitted when an external Neo4j command runs without NEO4J_URI, NEO4J_USER, and NEO4J_PASSWORD. The pm-cli repository contains no Neo4j implementation or configuration references, so ownership likely belongs to an extension or downstream integration; prevent unrelated external expected-configuration errors from blocking pm-cli release gates while preserving actionable attribution.

Identify the emitting package and release; attribute the Sentry event to the owning project or classify the expected configuration error without hiding real pm-cli failures; sentry-telemetry-gate reports zero unrelated highs; document verification with current issue/event evidence.

value.author: codex-gpt5-root
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-14: pm search 'Neo4j not configured NEO4J_URI PM-CLI-29' --status all and pm search neo4j --status all found no canonical Neo4j/Sentry item; gh issue search found no matching GitHub issue. Live release gate reports PM-CLI-29 high, while repository rg finds no Neo4j implementation, so this is filed as external-integration observability ownership under pm-5oj5.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Live verification 2026-07-14: pnpm release:gates passed build, typecheck, docs, static quality, 100/100/100/100 coverage (5,678 tests), version, secrets, packed npx smoke, and 88-command package-first dogfood, then failed only sentry-telemetry-gate because current PM-CLI-29 remains one high. Sentry event is handled=yes from pm-cli@2026.7.13 on an external Object.run command requiring Neo4j configuration; current SDK relationship changes contain no Neo4j surface. Telemetry was healthy: 0.29% finish error rate, zero failures missing error_code.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live Sentry evidence 2026-07-14: pnpm sentry:telemetry:gate reports exactly two actionable highs in the 14-day window; PM-CLI-29 remains the separately tracked external Neo4j configuration error and PM-CLI-2B is pm-d4ns. Seventeen handled expected events are filtered, with zero criticals. This bundle does not claim or implement pm-7n5a.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Enrichment pass #84: backfill risk/confidence (external Neo4j config surface — moderate integration risk, behavior understood)

value.author: unknown
value.text: Live verification 2026-07-15: PM-CLI-29 remains unresolved high with 193 handled events on pm-cli@2026.7.13, last seen 2026-07-14T11:21:30Z. The stack remains an external Object.run Neo4j command; this SDK/config/author bundle contains no Neo4j surface and does not claim pm-7n5a.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Now RELEASE-BLOCKING: 2026-07-15 scheduled Auto Release run 29390986598 failed its Sentry gate on this issue (PM-CLI-29, high, 2-of-2 blocking set with pm-d4ns). pm next currently recommends this item. Every daily release stays blocked until fixed or specifically classified.

message: Start wide SDK governance, cross-platform reliability, and release-blocker implementation bundle

value.text: Owner fix shipped for review as pm-graph PR #25: bundled errors use the PmCliError discriminant and missing optional Neo4j configuration exits with expected usage code 2. Owner acceptance passed 67 tests, typecheck, zero-vulnerability audit, pack and changelog checks. Keep in progress until owner PR merges and published package is verified.
